description: An empty synthetic user config ({}) cannot establish any of the five claude-code rules' effective values because other configuration layers are not inspected.

findings.message: Cannot determine local session transcript retention window: cleanupPeriodDays is unset in the user-level config; Claude Code's documented 30-day default applies absent an override, but uninspected managed, project, local, or CLI-flag layers may supply a different effective value.
findings.unknown_reason: cleanupPeriodDays is unset in the user-level config; Claude Code's documented 30-day default applies absent an override, but uninspected managed, project, local, or CLI-flag layers may supply a different effective value.

findings.message: Cannot determine error-reporting opt-out posture: env.DISABLE_ERROR_REPORTING is unset in the user-level config; error reporting is on only when the inspected install signs in with a Claude Pro or Max subscription, runs Claude Code v2.1.198 or later, connects directly to the Claude API, and the organization has no zero-data-retention or HIPAA agreement — this rule does not determine account, version, or provider state, and uninspected managed, project, local, or CLI-flag layers plus the ambient shell environment may also set DISABLE_ERROR_REPORTING outside this file.
findings.unknown_reason: env.DISABLE_ERROR_REPORTING is unset in the user-level config; error reporting is on only when the inspected install signs in with a Claude Pro or Max subscription, runs Claude Code v2.1.198 or later, connects directly to the Claude API, and the organization has no zero-data-retention or HIPAA agreement — this rule does not determine account, version, or provider state, and uninspected managed, project, local, or CLI-flag layers plus the ambient shell environment may also set DISABLE_ERROR_REPORTING outside this file.

findings.message: Cannot determine /feedback command opt-out posture: env.DISABLE_FEEDBACK_COMMAND is unset in the user-level config; the /feedback command is on by default for direct Claude API usage but off by default for every alternative model-provider integration, this rule does not determine which provider is active, and uninspected managed, project, local, or CLI-flag layers plus the ambient shell environment may also set DISABLE_FEEDBACK_COMMAND outside this file.
findings.unknown_reason: env.DISABLE_FEEDBACK_COMMAND is unset in the user-level config; the /feedback command is on by default for direct Claude API usage but off by default for every alternative model-provider integration, this rule does not determine which provider is active, and uninspected managed, project, local, or CLI-flag layers plus the ambient shell environment may also set DISABLE_FEEDBACK_COMMAND outside this file.

findings.message: Cannot determine session quality survey opt-out posture: env.CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_FEEDBACK_SURVEY is unset in the user-level config; the session quality survey is on by default regardless of model provider, and it is also disabled as a side effect when DISABLE_TELEMETRY, DO_NOT_TRACK, or CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_NONESSENTIAL_TRAFFIC is set — none of which this rule inspects — so this unset value alone does not establish the survey is active, and uninspected managed, project, local, or CLI-flag layers plus the ambient shell environment may also set the variable outside this file.
findings.unknown_reason: env.CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_FEEDBACK_SURVEY is unset in the user-level config; the session quality survey is on by default regardless of model provider, and it is also disabled as a side effect when DISABLE_TELEMETRY, DO_NOT_TRACK, or CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_NONESSENTIAL_TRAFFIC is set — none of which this rule inspects — so this unset value alone does not establish the survey is active, and uninspected managed, project, local, or CLI-flag layers plus the ambient shell environment may also set the variable outside this file.

findings.message: Cannot determine usage-metrics telemetry opt-out posture: env.DISABLE_TELEMETRY is unset in the user-level config; usage metrics are on by default for direct Claude API usage but off by default for every alternative model-provider integration unless explicitly enabled, this rule does not determine which provider is active, and uninspected managed, project, local, or CLI-flag layers plus the ambient shell environment may also set DISABLE_TELEMETRY outside this file.
findings.unknown_reason: env.DISABLE_TELEMETRY is unset in the user-level config; usage metrics are on by default for direct Claude API usage but off by default for every alternative model-provider integration unless explicitly enabled, this rule does not determine which provider is active, and uninspected managed, project, local, or CLI-flag layers plus the ambient shell environment may also set DISABLE_TELEMETRY outside this file.
